title: Tarotoo Tarot Card Meanings (All 78 Cards)
subtitle: All 78 tarot cards: meanings, keywords, love, career, planet, zodiac, yes/no
description:
A complete, structured dataset of all 78 tarot cards (22 Major Arcana + 56 Minor Arcana) in the Rider-Waite-Smith tradition, published by Tarotoo (tarotoo.com). Each card includes upright and reversed meanings, keywords, love and career contexts, planet and zodiac associations (Golden Dawn attributions), a yes/no value for yes-or-no readings, and a link to each card's meaning page on tarotoo.com.

Fields: id, name, arcana, suit, number_numerology, element, planet, zodiac, yes_no, keywords_upright, keywords_reversed, meaning_upright, meaning_reversed, love, career, mood, spiritual, url.

Source of truth: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-tarot-dataset
DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21268290
MCP server: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-mcp-server

License: MIT.

Intended Use: This dataset is intended for educational, research, creative, entertainment, and self-reflection purposes. It should not be used as a substitute for medical, legal, financial, mental-health, or other professional advice.

resources.description: All 78 tarot cards, one row per card. Keywords joined with '; '. Empty planet/suit where not applicable.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable card identifier, 0-77 (0-21 Major Arcana, then Wands, Cups, Swords, Pentacles)

fields.name: name
fields.description: Card name, e.g. "The Fool", "Ace of Cups"

fields.name: suit
fields.description: Empty for Major Arcana; wands, cups, swords, or pentacles

fields.name: number_numerology
fields.description: Card number for numerology (courts: Page=11, Knight=12, Queen=13, King=14)

fields.name: element
fields.description: Classical element: Fire, Water, Air, or Earth

fields.name: planet
fields.description: Planetary association (empty where not applicable, e.g. Aces)

fields.name: zodiac
fields.description: Zodiac sign(s); the element's three signs for Aces and Pages

fields.name: yes_no
fields.description: yes, no, or maybe - for yes-or-no readings

fields.name: meaning_upright
fields.description: Upright meaning as concise keyword phrases

fields.name: meaning_reversed
fields.description: Reversed meaning as concise keyword phrases

resources.description: Canonical JSON: array of 78 card objects with the same 18 fields (keywords as arrays, null for missing planet/suit).
